description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a landscaped lot, featuring a mix of flat and sloped rooflines and a combination of white and gray exterior finishes. The property is surrounded by a stone wall and includes a driveway, a garage, and multiple green spaces with trees and shrubs. The house itself has two visible stories, with large windows arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light. Outdoor amenities include a swimming pool, circular seating areas, and a patio, enhancing the recreational appeal of the property. The main entryway is accessible via a paved path and is accentuated by a small overhang and steps. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and sloped roofs, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a stone wall, and outdoor amenities like a pool and patio. The exterior features white and gray finishes with large, asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, circular seating areas, and additional green spaces.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, pool, and extensive garden area, with the stone wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, side garden, and the arrangement of trees and flower beds along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small overhang, steps, and a paved path, flanked by landscaping and minimal decorative elements.
